Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Chon Ma]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Chon Ma is the number-one Underlord in the Blackflame Empire and head of the Cloud Hammer School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Chon Ma scowls beneath a cloud.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Chon Ma is the top-ranked Underlord in the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Chon Ma is a bear of a man.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Chon Ma is the head of the Cloud Hammer school.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Chon Ma is a Cloud Hammer Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Chon Ma was bleeding from a cut on his face.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Chon Ma is the Cloud Hammer Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Chon Ma is the Underlord of the Cloud Hammer school.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
